summary:
SUPERNATURAL FINANCIAL PROVISION AND ABUNDANCE: Brandon describes a spiritual insight regarding the immediate repayment of homes and the manifestation of wealth for those who have remained faithful to prophetic words. Brandon emphasizes that God is moving people from a state of lack into a river of multiplication, promising that believers will occupy buildings they did not build and reap harvests from fields they did not plant.

BREAKING THE DEBT CYCLE AND SPIRITUAL RESTORATION: Brandon declares a supernatural cancellation of debts, including medical expenses and student loans, while rebuking a poverty mentality within the church. Brandon teaches that fellowship with God leads to total restoration of everything lost, as Brandon invokes the power of the blood of Jesus to break stagnant financial cycles and open doors for business growth.

CULTURAL CRITIQUE AND MEDIA INDEPENDENCE: Brandon calls for the creation of independent Christian media platforms to escape the censorship and bullying associated with secular social media owners. Brandon petitions for a divine visitation for Elon Musk, envisioning the billionaire using his technological reach for the gospel, and similarly prays for the salvation of influential cultural figures like the Kardashians and various pop stars.

POLITICAL INTERCESSION AND GOVERNMENTAL INTEGRITY: Brandon intercedes for the wisdom and protection of President Trump and advocates for the integrity of law enforcement and intelligence agencies. Brandon prophesies a significant political and spiritual shift in Minnesota, supporting Mike Lindell's efforts to bring a red wave of revival that counters corruption in the state.

PERSONAL TRIUMPH OVER DEPRESSION AND SUICIDE: Brandon shares a personal story of overcoming deep despair and suicidal thoughts through spiritual intervention, offering hope to those currently facing mental health struggles. Brandon explains that God's love is unconditional and available to all, including the most notorious historical figures, provided there is a willingness to repent and seek a relationship with Jesus.

PROPHETIC REVIVAL AND THE OVERFLOW OF THE HOLY SPIRIT: Brandon foretells a major move of the Holy Spirit originating in Minneapolis that will spread geographically through the South and eventually impact nations like Nigeria. Brandon experiences an intense spiritual encounter during this declaration, describing a refreshing river of glory that empowers believers to live with joy and spiritual authority.
rawData: [April 08, 2026]-[Come pray with me - 2]-[https://youtu.be/jonj7Nq5hG8]-[Well, I'll just jump right in the river by myself here. I don't know what to do. Obviously, we hit a nerve again. Is there anybody coming? Thank you, Lord, that our internet works. It's back. I don't know if it's this thing over here, so I'm going to plug in. Well, I know, honey, but I don't know if it ever goes out. I have mama sit here and help and let us know if it goes back in and out. Because if it goes out again, I won't know because I have no way of telling. My knees get stiff when I sit here for so long. Well, let's just pray. And if you're here, I'm praying. Just act like nobody's here anyway. I'm just going to pray like I would at home. Okay. So you just come and pray with me, okay? If you're here, you're here; if you're not, you're not. I'm going to pray for our president, and I'll pretend like you're here and I'll pretend like you're not, I guess. I don't know. Either way, I'm just going to pray. So, if you all can do your thing, I'm going to enter in, and now you can just pray. You pray with me, baby, and we'll do a prayer and we'll just pray for our president and pray for our economy and things like that. Father, we just thank you, Lord. I'm seeing houses. I'm seeing homes. I hear the Lord say, 'Brandon, I'm going to pay off people's houses quickly. I'm going to pay off people's houses quickly. Pull it out of the spirit realm into the natural and for supernatural thinking.' Many, many a supernaturally funded... All right. There's many of you that have had—I see visions. You've had dreams. You've had prophetic words that you have let go of. There are many of you that have let go of prophetic promises—these prophetic words that have been inside of your spirit, stirring inside of you. And you thought, 'When is this coming to pass? When is the manifestation coming to pass at last?' And the Lord said, 'It's time for you to stretch forth and believe what would seem impossible. I will bring it and make it possible by my hand, by my goodness, by the angels, and I will send them on assignment to bring forth the greater wealth, to bring forth the greater wells of glory, to bring forth the buildings that need to be built. There'll be buildings that you did not build. There'll be wells that you did not dig. There'll be fountains of the rivers, and the rivers will flow. There'll be fields that you did not plant. And there's a harvest that you will reap. I'm seeing a supernatural increase on many of you in the days ahead. For the rivers will flow, and there'll be great rivers of blessing and increase and multiplication. I'm seeing this. I see rivers that are full of blessing—rivers that are full. I didn't say a stream. I didn't say a trickle. He said, 'I'm saying it's a river.' And in this river, I will a bountiful, multiplied seed, exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask or think seed. I see some of these houses are on golf courses. Some of these houses are in gated communities—rich foundations, good homes for godly homes. And I see abundance coming on folks. You've got to take off the chokehold for what you have. Take off the chokehold. That's what He's talking about. You're chokehold in what you've been believing for. Take off that chokehold. Come up higher. Come up higher in your believing—poverty mentality. It's a poverty-lack mentality. Break out of it. I have great things in store, and it's out the front door. I see these beautiful houses that you did not build. I see a transfer of the wealth of the wicked laid up for the righteous. I can tell you where it's coming from. I can see the fountain that does not run dry. I see some of you even got brand new cars coming. You say, 'Well, Brandon, you've just seen a lot of good stuff.' Yep. Because He said you've been sowing and you have sacrificially been giving, and the greater manifestation of what I have for you is coming. Don't give up. Don't lose heart. Come stronger into my throne room. Write it down. Make it clear. Write the petition down. Make a petition of what you're believing for. Take communion over it. Back it with scripture. A greater manifestation of the glory is coming on you. And it's time for the overflow harvest that you have sown toward and a greater manifestation of glory and the greater manifestation of His presence on your house, on your finances—Called days of heaven on earth. Lay hold to it. Do you hear me? I'm talking about great communities. I'm talking about golfing communities. I'm talking about blessing of increase. The people around you say, 'How did that happen?' You say, 'Only by the hand of the Lord.' I see it. Oh, the spoils the Lord called. These are the spoils. Do you see the spoils, honey? I don't know if I'm live or not, but I see this love and I see the spoils. The Lord said, 'As the children of Israel left and got the spoils of Egypt, I'm bringing forth the spoils for my children and the wealth of the sinners. If you're listening to me, I will bring you the fountains of wealth—fountains of wealth, of great riches, in the deep hidden things—and the greater glory, the greater manifestation of my presence will be on you, and you'll lack no good thing.' He said, 'Who is on the Lord's side? Who is on my side?' Stop playing patty-cake Christianity. Come up higher in your believing, for with me, come up higher in your expectation for what you are about to see. Come up higher. I will provide your heart's desire if you come up higher and have fellowship with me. Don't seek the things, but seek me. I am your El Shaddai. I will provide. I will take care of you. I will restore what the cankerworm ate from you if you will just come up higher in your fellowship with me. I am your abundant supply. I am the exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask or think God. And it will come with a greater flow and a greater restoration to the ones that are sold out—the ones that are sold out to me, the ones that are looking toward me. And you say, 'Well, I live in a place of poverty-torn, poverty-worn.' It's like war-torn. I see places with little metal huts. I see people with dirt floors. He said, 'I'm even talking to them. I'll restore everything that was taken from them. A restoring of what the cankerworm has eaten. I'll restore it back if you just believe me for it.' I see doctor bills being paid in full. I see medical bills being paid in full. I see student loans being paid in full. He said, 'Reach out and believe me for it.' You have great doctor bills and the Lord's going to restore back everything the devil has taken and stolen from you. And He's going to give you back your health. Receive healing in your body. We call the seeds that you have sowed—we call those seeds that have miracle ground in the name of Jesus. We call forth the stagnant seeds that have been planted for decades past. We call it to come to harvest at last. We speak to the seeds. We speak to the growth. We call you debt-free in the name of Jesus. We call doctor bills paid. We call your house paid. We call their student loans paid. We call those things that be not as though they were. We're calling for a turnaround in your finances. We call for jobs and better jobs, raises and bonuses. We call it out of the realm of the spirit into the natural in the name of Jesus. And we thank You, Lord, that everything You have in store—every good and perfect gift—comes from the Father. We thank You, Lord, that You're the God of the abundant supply. We call it in right now. We're calling in those seeds. We call in our businesses to double, triple, and quadruple in the name of Jesus. We thank You, Lord, that we will be the head and not the tail; we will be above and not beneath. And we'll take the spoils and the plunder, for the wealth of the sinner is laid up for the righteous. We take the plunder and the spoils, for seedtime and harvest is accelerating. When the sowers and the reapers are going hand in hand, the time of the harvest is at hand. Eyes to see that which is in front of thee. You say, 'What do I have?' I hear, 'What do I have?' Let us break the back of poverty with a financial seed. You, spirit of poverty, we break you in the name of Jesus. We break you off the body of Christ. We call for the harvest in the name of Jesus: 30, 60, and 100-fold. Satan, get your hands off of our stuff in the name of Jesus. We call for 30, 60, and 100-fold in the name of Jesus. We're calling it in: jobs and better jobs. Father, we thank You, Lord, that we are called to be the abundant supply in this earth, that the earth will see that the goodness of God brings man to repentance. We're saying the goodness of God is on us. Father, we thank You that the willing and obedient will eat the good of the land. The good of the land is ours, Father. I thank You for the willing and obedient, and we're calling the willing and obedient to rise up. We're willing, Father; we'll do what You ask us to do, and we're obedient to what You've asked us to do. And we sow and we reap. It's part of seedtime and harvest, Father. Just as much as it is to sow into the Kingdom of God, it is to reap. It's time to reap. And you don't just reap back what you sowed; you reap multiplication, health, mental clarity, and favor in your marriage, your children, and your jobs. Favor wherever you go. Maybe a good deal on a meal. I just know that God is more than the box we put Him in. We say, 'Well, You have to operate in this little box,' but increase comes in all ways. It could be a sale at the grocery store where you get two-for-one—that's increase and favor, being in the right place at the right time. Someone says, 'Hey, I want to buy your coffee today,' that's increase. Don't despise small beginnings. If someone gives you a dollar, be excited about the dollar. If someone says, 'Hey, I found a quarter here; I'll give this to you,' be excited about increase. Regardless of what it is or how much it is, every good and perfect thing comes from God. I believe that even in a cup of coffee. God, I thank You for a cup of coffee; You're the God of the free cup of coffee. Be thankful and grateful for everything God does for you. Even if you say, 'Well, that's not very much,' it's a start. I'm so thankful for the start, Father, and for the drop. A rainstorm starts with one drop of rain. I hear the sound of an abundance of rain and blessing on my household today. It starts with one drop. You may not have your overflow yet, but it doesn't start with a whole bunch of drops; the first drop has to hit somewhere. I believe the time of the harvest is at hand. This seedtime and harvest is accelerating, and it's time to call back the seeds that have lain dormant. We call those seeds to be cultivated and watered to come forth in the name of Jesus. Some plant, some water, but God brings forth the increase. I believe that God is bringing forth my increase today in ways that I can't comprehend. It doesn't have to be in my natural thinking. It's above all that I dare ask or think. If I can think it, it's not big enough. Think bigger. That's what I'm hearing Him say: 'Stir up yourself to believe Me for bigger: exceedingly, abundantly above all that you dare ask or think.' I can think some big things, but He's going to do more. 'My thoughts are higher than your thoughts; My ways are higher than your ways.' That's what He says. I believe I receive the bountiful supply over my household, even at the risk of being persecuted for it. Father, I thank You. Even persecution comes for the Word's sake. Persecution comes when people get jealous of what you have. Just let them get jealous; I'm not going to shy back from every good and perfect thing You have for us. You have to lay hold to it by faith. I lay hold to it in the name of Jesus for exceedingly, abundantly above all that we dare ask or think. If you don't want to believe for it, fine—that's on you. I don't care what you believe; I believe it. And if you don't want to receive yours, I can receive it for you. That may tick somebody off, but if you don't want yours, I'll take it. Why not believe for bigger? Why do we limit God with our stinking thinking? Always thinking, 'Well, the world can have it, but we can't.' Mr. Starbucks has it; Mark Zuckerberg sure has it, and he can flip off my channel anytime he wants. Why aren't we the ones over social media? Why is it that we have to go on their channel and have them tell us what to do? It takes millions of dollars to create Facebook, right? Well, if he just turns my channel off and says, 'Oh, we don't want you on here anymore,' why don't we have a platform like Facebook and own it? We could say, 'Listen, we're only going to let godly content on here. We're not going to let any Jezebels on here.' Why is it that the body of Christ has always been a servant to the world when God created all things richly for us to enjoy? Yet the body of Christ chokes on it and says, 'Oh, you can't; it's too much.' And they're all building bunkers, having houses in Hawaii, chilling out on the beach, and enjoying their drinks and sinning, while we're trying to get the Gospel out. Why is it that we have a chokehold on a million dollars? Why do we have a chokehold on ten million or on a billionaire? 'Oh, we can't touch that; that's too much.' But we see these people that are sex trafficking these kids, who are living in penthouses and all of it. You look at it and go, 'They are evil,' and all we want to do is get the Gospel out, but the body of Christ chokes on it. And He says, 'Believe Me for more.' The devil's crowd has it and they convince you that you can't. I have never taken a vow of poverty and never will. I've seen what it takes. And yet people like Jesse Duplantis and Kenneth Copeland and all these others, they have the blessing and everything, and people persecute them and say, 'Well, they shouldn't have it.' "They took the old widow's money." And you don't know how they got their money. How were you in their finances, auditing them and taking their stuff? No, you weren't. Or they'd be in jail if they did something wrong. But yet people are always throwing stones at people who have more. People are stupid. And you look at it and go, "Whatever, man." If the Lord would bless them, He'd bless us. Why are we always limiting God? I'm not going to limit God with my thinking. If He wants to bring it to me and get it through me so I can help somebody else out, then whatever. I just don't understand why people get so upset about stuff when you see people in the world who are driving around in Ferraris and trafficking little kids and you go, "Well, look at that." From Epstein trafficking children to islands and people don't say much; he got killed in prison, but I'm just saying there's a lot of people that are attached to the Epstein list who are still not in jail. I try to understand the body of Christ's thinking, but the moment you see a brother get blessed, you instantaneously throw rocks at him. And I go, "What? Why?" Because I know. I believe in the power of the seed. If you have a need, sow a seed. That's my harvest. Believe. If you have a need, sow a seed. That's what I hear the Lord say. If you have a need, sow a seed. What do you have a need for? Exceedingly, abundantly, above all that you dare ask or think. God is a good God, and the devil's a bad devil. And the devil crowd has the money. That's what I'm hearing tonight. Stir yourself up in the way you believe. Stir yourself up in the capacity to believe for more. We're at the end of this. The end is right at our door. And people don't want to hear it. Their heads are in the sand. And I'm thinking, why not create a new Facebook and call it something else? Why does it have to be that they can kick me off and say, "We're not going to allow you to put the Gospel on there anymore"? Why? Why don't we have something to say, "Well, fine. We have Godface"? I mean, I don't know. I get so tired of the world bullying Christians and saying you can't say anything anymore. And that's why I rise up inside; I say enough is enough. And we don't care how many followers you have; we just don't like the Gospel that you preach. Okay, and we just have to let it happen? No, no, no. Why don't we have platforms? Why don't we have the ability to reach out and do that? It takes money. That's why we have things that are just halfway done. And you go, "Well, that platform doesn't attract the world." They don't come over there and want to hear it. Thank God for Elon Musk. I'm believing God for his salvation. Let's pray for him right now. Let's believe God with the people that are here. I don't know how many of you are here right now, but let's believe God for Elon Musk's salvation. He'll use X and it'll remain strong so that they don't kick us off and won't be able to censor us; that he'll keep on being that place where we are able to say stuff on X without them censoring Christianity and saying, "Listen, we don't want what you're saying over here." Wouldn't that be wonderful? Let's believe God for Elon Musk. Father, I thank You, Lord, right now in the name of Jesus that Elon Musk, wherever he's at—he may be in his bed, he may be in his hotel, he might be out partying right now—but we know that You know where he's at. And we call him born again in the name of Jesus. We call him right out of the pit of hell. We say, "Elon Musk, your whole family is getting born again." Even if you like it or not, every single one of you is going to get radically saved. I call you radically born again, Elon Musk. I call you filled with the Holy Ghost. And I say in the name of Jesus, you're coming in sooner than later. So stop running. Come to Jesus. Run, Elon Musk, to Jesus. It's time for you to have a visitation from our great Father. So, Father, I thank You; if You would visit a Muslim in the middle of the desert and You would appear to them in a dream or a vision and they would give their heart to You, I ask You to touch Elon Musk right now. Right now, we are all in agreement that You radically save Elon Musk and let him come on there and say, "I was once lost, but now I'm found. I gave my heart to Jesus Christ. And I'm not just some patty-cake Christian. But I'm here to tell you, I've seen things. I know things. And I'm telling you that Jesus Christ is coming." Wouldn't that be wonderful if he was like a John the Baptist? I was once lost, but now I'm found. And he starts preaching the Gospel. Why not? If God can save you, He can save me. He can save Elon Musk. I'm calling him born again. I'm calling him saved. I'm calling him radical for Jesus. You may laugh at it. You say, "That's the craziest thing." No. I've seen God do—I've seen darker people, more evil, satanic people give their heart to Jesus Christ when it seemed that there was no hope at all. And Elon Musk—God is no respecter of persons and He can save him right now where he's at. Snatch him right out of the pit of hell. Father, I believe that today is the day that we can mark it on our calendar that we will know that today is a day of turnaround in Elon Musk's life, and that he'll use Starlink, he'll use his platforms, and many sons and daughters will come home through the saving knowledge of the Lord Jesus Christ using his technological advancements. I say in the name of Jesus, I call him saved. I call radical people around him. I call him born again. I call the darkness off of his eyes. I say in the name of Jesus, his eyes are flooded with light. I say he is born again. Flood him with light, Lord. Flood his eyes, the fog over his mind. Satan, let him go. And there will be a change in the bloodline. Many, many, we call you born again. We call him radically saved. We call him stirred up. That every single person that he comes in contact with will see that there's a difference in him. That Jesus Christ is Lord of lords and King of kings of Elon Musk's life. Forgive me, Father, for always judging people; forgive me for my mealy-mouthed thinking and my negative thinking. Forgive me, Lord. All things are possible to him who believes. I call Kim Kardashian, Khloe Kardashian, and all the sisters—Kendall, Kylie, all of them—we call them radically saved. We call them born again. We call them filled with the Holy Ghost. We say they're coming out of the darkness and into the light. We call a stirring in them even tonight as they sleep. We pray for them, Father, in the name of Jesus; for the work that You've done already in Khloe, You will finish it. You stir in her in the name of Jesus. We call protection around that family. They will use their social media platforms all to the glory of God. We pray for that family in the name of Jesus to have a radical visitation, that they would have their Road to Damascus experience. We call Justin Bieber, Hailey, his wife, and even Billie, Father—I call them, even with the satanic stuff they practice, we call them born again. We call Billie Eilish saved in Jesus' name. We call Hollywood invaded with the glory of God. And they would use their influence for the glory of God. Even when I'm seeing the spiders and all these things around them, I thank you, Lord. We're not moved by what we see. We're not moved by what we feel. Father, you can take the darkest of the dark and turn it into light. Do you all believe it—that it's time for the church to rise up and be the salt because salt makes you thirsty? It's time for the church to rise up and have a backbone like a crowbar and bring the lost in. And it's going to take finances to do it. Stop this weak, stinking thinking. Change your mindset concerning this. It's not about you becoming lustful over stuff. It's about getting the gospel out so that we can get out of here. I want to go home with Jesus in the rapture of the church. Let's finish strong, church. It's time to stop thinking small. 'Well, it's my four and no more.' No, he wants to save that which was lost. He said, 'I'm waiting on you. Bring in my harvest and I'll come and get you.' But most people are just thinking, 'Well, if we can just say Kumbaya, my Lord, Kumbaya.' And they have these little services and they have the little candlelight out in the parking lot and they're just, 'Oh, we got a Holy Ghost bump.' And they go home and you go, 'What was that all about? Did anybody get saved? Did anybody get prayer up in here?' No. But we felt a little bit of something and we had our candle and we had our little communion and we had our little service afterwards and we got five people up in here. We all went home, but yet there's billions of people dying and going to hell. It's time to stop playing church. We must become radical and tell the people that Jesus Christ loves them. He doesn't want that any man should perish but all come in repentance. What makes us stand out the most? The wealth and the money is all that the world's after. If you got a brand new Rolls-Royce, you got their attention. If you got a brand new Ferrari and you pull up in a parking lot, everybody's looking. They're only after the money. That's all they care about. The world—that's all they care about. But if you can show them Jesus, they don't know what they're missing. All these Hollywood people are committing self-harm and trying to eliminate themselves by the droves. Like the guy that you know self-harmed himself, Robin Williams. And there's so many people that have done that, who were comedians and happy and you thought they were happy, but they were so empty. How do you self-harm to the point where you're not here anymore and we miss you? They're trying to feel something. It's sad. And I can tell you, I was that person that was so broken and I said, 'I can't do this anymore.' And I was ready to drive off a bridge. And it took a missionary coming from Romania named Ronald who prayed for me and cast the devil out of me. And I was free. And I remember like it was yesterday, feeling so down and so depressed that I didn't want to live anymore. And I thought, there has to be somebody on this other side of the camera that feels that same thing. You just feel, 'I just don't want to live anymore.' And I thought, man, who cares if they got money? They're just lost. Who cares if they're poor? They're just lost. They just need a fresh touch from Jesus. And I've made a determination because I remember how bad it hurt to be that down and that depressed to think I can't live anymore. And Jesus set me free. And I figured if he did it for me, he'd do it for you. And there's so many people that are trying to fill a hole that they're never going to fill. But if I can just tell you how to get there, Jesus will turn your mess into a message like he did for me. I just see them all. Elon Musk and all these people, they're just lost. He may be the richest man in the world, but he's just lost. And I don't see him buying stupid cars and things like that trying to fill a void. He's set out on a mission. He wants a legacy—build Starlink and all these things. He thinks differently. But what if you could switch somebody's thinking like that and they get born again and they start telling people about how good God is? People like Alex Jones that get radical for Jesus. 99.9% of you will never know the pressures that people like Alex Jones face—of popular opinion and public opinion and the pressure of things. I've seen a glimpse of it and I don't face what they face. They have millions and millions of people following them. I have like 3.9 million a month. They have hundreds of millions. But the pressure of it is absolutely incredible. And all I know is they just need a fresh touch from Jesus. They just need a fresh drink. And that's why I come here and I pray so late at night because I know there's somebody out there that is just believing for a breakthrough and they're saying, 'Does somebody at least care tonight? Does somebody just care for me? Can somebody just tell me that everything is going to be different soon? I don't know how much longer I can keep holding on to this rope. Can somebody tell me there's light at the end of the tunnel in my life?' Because I was that person. I'd stay up scrolling through YouTube looking for hope, looking for a preacher, looking for something to tell me that everything's going to be all right. And I didn't find it. It took me getting up one morning to go to church where a missionary called me out in the middle of the service and said, 'You right there, you. God has a plan for your life and you're running.' And he prayed for me. And I always go back to those God moments because nobody truly knew how close I was to doing myself in. I was just grabbing a hold of something because I was hurting so bad. So, when you have these moments, even like I'm feeling now, I feel the urge because I feel somebody's on the other side of this camera right now and I'm talking to you. I cry because I feel your pain. And I try to keep it together because I feel it, and it's part of the intercessor in me that you're just wanting somebody to pray for you. And I just want to let you know we love you. We pray for you and we're so glad you're here tonight. If I could be there with you right now on the other side of the camera, I would tell you I know God has a plan for your life. I know he loves you. I know he has more for you. And it's not for you to live the way you're living. Self-harm is never the answer. But I'm going to tell you, I understand the desperation. Jesus loves you and he paid the price. And if you just let him in, he'll change you from the inside out. But you've got to get real with yourself and you've got to get in a Bible. You say, 'I don't understand the Bible.' Find just scriptures that are simple, like in Psalms, and start meditating on Psalms and Proverbs. The entrance of his word brings forth light. And the more you read that Bible, it will change you from the inside out. But you got to get real and you got to stop running. And you got to stop feeling sorry for yourself. Because it was me feeling sorry for myself—oh, pity me. And really, bottom line is nobody really feels sorry for you. You have to have grit and say, 'Hey, I'm doing this for the Lord. He cares.' There may not be anybody else around you, but he cares. That's all that matters. And that's why I pray for Elon Musk. The Lord cares for you. The Lord loves you. The Lord loves President Trump. The Lord loves even all those Muslims that are passing away in Iran. He don't want any of them to go to hell. He doesn't want the Ayatollah going to hell. As crazy as that may sound, he doesn't want anybody to go to hell. He wants you to repent. He didn't want Hitler to go to hell; he wanted him to repent and turn from his wicked ways. As nutsy as this may sound, Jesus died for Hitler to go to heaven. Jesus died and suffered so that Hitler didn't have to go to hell. But Hitler chose hell and Hitler chose to do what he did. But Jesus died for him, and he loved him, and he said, 'Man, I don't want you to go to hell, Hitler. I don't want you to do all the things you're doing.' But he chose it. God is no respecter of persons; he loves us all. From Marilyn Manson to Charles Manson to all of them, he loves them all. But it's our choice to accept Jesus Christ. So if you're here tonight and I'm talking to you and you feel that stirring inside of you right now, and you're saying, 'Brandon, you're talking to me. Will you please pray for me?'
